source: Multnomah County HSD Quarterly Data Dashboard
note: Data extracted from hardcoded Chart.js on the page. FY = July 1 - June 30.

housing_placements_by_fy.description: People moved from homelessness into permanent housing, cumulative by fiscal year

shs_housing_placements_fy24_by_quarter.description: SHS-funded housing placements (supportive housing, rapid rehousing, other permanent housing)

rent_assistance_enrolled_by_fy.description: People/households receiving rent assistance for eviction prevention. Decline reflects wind-down of pandemic-era Emergency Rental Assistance.

shelter_capacity_avg_beds_quarterly.description: Average HSD-funded shelter beds in Multnomah County. Excludes City of Portland-operated, faith-based, and non-HSD shelters.

shelter_utilization_fy24.description: Percent of available shelter beds occupied on any given night

tableau_endpoints.note: The Tableau dashboard requires tableau-scraper Python library for automated data extraction. The quarterly dashboard at /quarterly-data-dashboard/ uses Chart.js with hardcoded data and is easier to scrape.
